sample: eBOSS Emission Line Galaxies, 10.5 < log10(M_*/Msun) < 11, 0.7 < z < 0.8

columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

data_source: Guo+2019 Figure 4 (wp.pdf), first panel (0.7<z<0.8), blue square symbols, 10.5<M*<11 bin
extraction_method: visually digitized from arXiv source wp.pdf converted to PNG at 150dpi
triple_check: rp values span 1.3-31.6 h^-1 Mpc (8 log-spaced bins, Δlog r=0.2)
wp values decrease monotonically from 24 to 0.4 h^-1 Mpc — physically expected
wp_err is ~20-25% of wp — consistent with eBOSS ELG shot noise at z~0.75
pi_max=20 h^-1 Mpc confirmed from paper TeX source (rpi_max = 20)
notes: Planck 2015 cosmology. Extends Guo+2018 with quenched ELG fraction. Published best-fit from Table 3 of Guo+2019.
